title: stelis zelleri
intro: Stelis zelleri, also known as the Zeller's Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis zelleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant effects. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
